funnel_target: Reassess whether existing OKX positioning or native open-interest fields now have enough data and independent primary evidence to pass the pre-PnL mechanism gate.

I055.name_cn: 大户平均多空仓位尺寸差
I055.direction_claim: follow the side with larger average position size among top traders
mechanism_failures: top-trader classification does not identify informed speculation versus hedging
the losing counterparty or payer is not observable from aggregate ratios
no independent primary evidence was found that fixes follow-versus-contrarian direction for this exact OKX field
cost scale cannot be justified as compensation from an identified payer before PnL

I056.name_cn: 大户账户方向相对全体账户分歧
mechanism_failures: top traders may be informed directional traders, basis hedgers, market makers or inventory hedgers
agreement can imply information continuation while crowding can imply reversal
the aggregate ratio does not reveal entry prices, leverage, horizon or hedge legs
no independent primary evidence was found that fixes a unique executable direction for this exact field

I057.name_cn: 大户持仓比相对全体账户比

primary_evidence_search.title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
primary_evidence_search.finding_for_this_gate: Predictive evidence comes from one-second order-book and trade features such as imbalance, spread and adverse selection, not aggregate top-trader positioning ratios.

primary_evidence_search.title: Crypto Pricing with Hidden Factors
primary_evidence_search.finding_for_this_gate: Cross-sectional premia are linked to latent factors and external equity, sentiment, rotation and security-shock variables; the study does not identify OKX top-trader ratios as an informed directional factor.

primary_evidence_search.title: Machine Learning-Based Bitcoin Trading Under Transaction Costs: Evidence From Walk-Forward Forecasting
primary_evidence_search.finding_for_this_gate: Selected hourly price-feature models can survive costs only with model-specific cost-aware filters; this is a single-asset machine-learning price strategy and provides no directional evidence for positioning ratios.

primary_evidence_search.title: Reconciling Open Interest with Traded Volume in Perpetual Swaps
primary_evidence_search.finding_for_this_gate: Open-interest reporting can be inconsistent across exchanges, reinforcing the need for same-exchange point-in-time validation; it does not establish a return-prediction direction for top-trader ratios.

prohibited_rescue_actions: reverse the I055 or I056 sign after seeing returns
smooth or transform the ratios until a direction appears
combine I055 and I056 into a renamed factor
open PnL to decide whether top traders should be followed or faded
allowed_next_work: continue H22, V357 and H27 forward evidence
continue searching for a new point-in-time OKX causal field with an observable payer and unique direction
recheck native OI only after genuinely longer local coverage exists; do not repeatedly rerun unchanged short samples
keep aggregate positioning ratios available as diagnostic controls, not Alpha
